mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_goods_order (goods_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, status) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.status, o.create_time, o.update_time, g.title AS goods_title FROM t_goods_order o LEFT JOIN t_goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.status, o.create_time, o.update_time, g.title AS goods_title FROM t_goods_order o LEFT JOIN t_goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.status, o.create_time, o.update_time, g.title AS goods_title FROM t_goods_order o LEFT JOIN t_goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id WHERE o.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.status, o.create_time, o.update_time, g.title AS goods_title FROM t_goods_order o LEFT JOIN t_goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id WHERE o.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.id ASC LIMIT 1
